creator: bacon@smithers.neuro.mcw.edu
text:
Yes, I approve the patch. 

Thanks, Frank: One more item off my list...

    Jason

Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of science/afni,
>
> Please note that PR ports/106101 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/106101
>
